CREATE TABLE test_table (column1 String, column2 Int32, column3 DateTime);
SELECT murmurHash3_32(column1, column2, column3) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_64(array(column1, column2), 10) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_32(Tuple(column1, column2), 'constant') AS hash_value FROM test_table WHERE column2 = 1;
SELECT murmurHash3_64(DISTINCT column1) AS unique_hash FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_32(arrayJoin(array(column1, column2)), 'some_constant') AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_32(1, toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00'), column2) AS combined_hash FROM test_table WHERE column1 = 'example1';
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT murmurHash3_32(column1, column2) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT t1.column1, murmurHash3_32(t1.column1, t2.column1) AS hash_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.column2 = t2.column2;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table) AS total_count SELECT murmurHash3_32(toString(total_count), column1) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_64(toTypeName(column1), toTypeName(column2), 'fixed_value') AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_32(Tuple(column1, Tuple(1, 2))) AS hash_value FROM test_table;
SELECT murmurHash3_64(array(column1, column2, column3), 'added_string') AS hash_value FROM test_table WHERE notEmpty(column1);
SELECT murmurHash3_32(murmurHash3_32(column1), column2) AS nested_hash FROM test_table;
